name: document_processor
description: Analyze local documents (text files, images) using AI vision models. Supports cross-referencing multiple files to answer questions. Accepts any local file path — either from web__download output or an existing file on disk.

ask.description: Ask a question about one or more local files using AI vision. Supports text (.md, .txt, .csv, .json, .xml, .html) and image (.png, .jpg, .jpeg, .gif, .webp) files. Returns a text answer synthesized from all provided files. Use for image analysis, cross-referencing documents, or extracting specific information from files downloaded via web__download.

paths.description: Local file paths to analyze (max 10). Use any accessible local path — output from web__download, or an existing file on disk.

question.description: Question to answer based on the documents. Be specific about what information you need.
